items.title:
[正面] 좋아하는 게임이라 하는 분들 늘어났으면 해서 적어봅니다

* 모바일로 하는 법: 쿠앱에서 ...
items.summary:
좋아하는 게임이라 하는 분들 늘어났으면 해서 적어봅니다

* 모바일로 하는 법: 쿠앱에서 설치할 수 있음(이메일 로그인 시 스팀과 연동 가능) 검색해서 개발자 Qookka이고 이름 뒤에 한자 많이 붙어있는 버전으로 까시면 됩니다.

* 번역: AI번역이라 매끄럽진 않은데 각 카드 성능 이해하는 데는 문제 없음, 스토리도 말투 왔다갔다 하는 거 적당히 감안 하면 볼만합니다. 

* 게임: 슬더슬처럼 진행됩니다... 어떤 진영 캐릭터와도 쓸 수 있는 혼돈진영 + 각각 메커니즘이 다른 심해, 혈육, 초차원 진영의 캐릭터들도 덱을 구성해서 플레이할 수 있습니다. 평범한 분재게임입니다.
그런데 게임 익숙해지게 되시면 메인 컨텐츠가 아니라 pvp가 정말 재밌으실겁니다.(페이즈 체스) 성능은 고정이기 때문에 명함만 따면 돼서 부담도 적고요... 진짜 하루종일 했습니다 저는

* 추천: 코스믹호러, 크툴루 기반 어두운 분위기 분재게임 좋아하시는 분

items.title: [负面] My biggest problem with the gameplay is the battle...
items.summary:
My biggest problem with the gameplay is the battle mechanic. It is a deck builder where you can not build your deck. 
You can collect characters with a gacha mechanic. And the Characters all have a different card Set with I think about 5 cards each at the beginning. 
But there is no way to collect or change cards. I got lots of upgrades for cards during the story. Like they got more special effects and I could choose witch of 3 card to upgrade. But this feels every random and doesnt change much. 

I want to collect and build decks. Not just charakters. The battle mechanic is so very repetitive. You dont have much choice what to do in battle. You could just use the auto battle mechanic.

items.title:
[正面] This game is a masterpiece (9.5/10).

The only iss...
items.summary:
This game is a masterpiece (9.5/10).

The only issue i had with this game is:
This game has too many confusing terms such as Exalt, Aliemus, Posse, etc. I was kinda confused by some of the terms. However, as long as you read the tutorial and memorize everything, it shouldn’t be a big issue.

items.title:
[负面] This is Across the Obelisk gacha edition. 

I th...
items.summary:
This is Across the Obelisk gacha edition. 

I think that this is probably the worse game though, the deckbuilding is nearly non-existent, so the roguelike elements are comparatively underbaked. The game is definitely complex, but I think it has conflated complexity with depth and it is not a particularly deep game, at least starting out. It has a lot of mechanics, but they do not matter because the game is trivially easy and you don't get to make a lot of meaningful decisions. A shame, it is pretty and I like the concept.
